subcodes.first_line: The appointed time hath been fulfilled, and the Promise hath come to pass, by command of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O Afnán! Upon thee be the Glory of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تم المیقات و اتی الوعد امرا من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم جناب افنان علیه بهاء الله
